title: Argentina parvula
taxonomy: Argentina parvula is classified within the family Rosaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Amygdaloideae and is a member of the tribe Maleae. The species is native to the southern Andes in Argentina and Chile. Further classification details may be found within the broader taxonomy of the family Rosaceae. This classification is subject to ongoing botanical research and revision.
